title: Hamilton
description: A fresh look at the era of America's Founding Fathers, told through the story of Alexander Hamilton with a score that blends hip-hop, jazz, R&B, and Broadway.

title: Wicked
description: The untold story of the witches of Oz, exploring an unlikely friendship between the brilliant, misunderstood Elphaba and the beautiful, popular Glinda before Dorothy's arrival.

title: The Lion King
description: Disney's landmark musical brings the African savanna to life on stage. Young lion prince Simba must confront his past and reclaim his rightful place as king after his father's death.

title: Chicago
description: The Tony-winning revival of Kander and Ebb's musical set in the jazz age, following two rival vaudevillian murderesses in Cook County Jail and the shrewd lawyer who turns their crimes into showbiz.

title: Moulin Rouge! The Musical
description: A theatrical celebration of truth, beauty, freedom, and love set in the legendary Parisian nightclub, featuring a lavish mashup of over 70 pop songs.

title: Harry Potter and the Cursed Child
description: The eighth story in the Harry Potter series, set nineteen years after the events of the original novels. Harry Potter's son Albus struggles with the weight of a family legacy he never wanted.

title: Aladdin
description: Disney's beloved animated story brought to thrilling theatrical life, following a charming street urchin, a courageous princess, and a larger-than-life Genie on a magical adventure.
lyricist: Howard Ashman, Tim Rice, and Chad Beguelin

title: MJ
description: Michael Jackson's unique and unparalleled artistry sets Broadway ablaze in this Tony Award-winning musical, centered on the creation of his 1992 Dangerous World Tour.

title: The Book of Mormon
description: The nine-time Tony Award-winning Best Musical follows two mismatched Mormon missionaries sent to a remote village in Uganda, where their faith is put to the ultimate test.
composer: Robert Lopez, Trey Parker, and Matt Stone
lyricist: Robert Lopez, Trey Parker, and Matt Stone
book_writer: Trey Parker, Robert Lopez, and Matt Stone

title: SIX: The Musical
description: A pop concert spectacle in which the six ex-wives of Henry VIII take the mic to tell their stories and reclaim their narratives from history.

title: & Juliet
description: A joyous, larger-than-life musical asking what would happen if Juliet decided to choose her own fate. Featuring the pop hits of Max Martin, from the Emmy-winning writer of Schitt's Creek.

title: Hadestown
description: The Tony-winning musical that intertwines two mythic tales — that of young dreamers Orpheus and Eurydice, and that of King Hades and his wife Persephone — on a journey to the underworld and back.

title: Oh, Mary!
description: A dark comedy examining Mary Todd Lincoln during the weeks preceding Abraham Lincoln's assassination, exploring themes of yearning, alcoholism, and suppressed desires through a comedic lens.

title: The Outsiders
description: The Tony Award-winning Best Musical based on S.E. Hinton's classic novel and Francis Ford Coppola's film. Set in 1967 Tulsa, Oklahoma, it follows Ponyboy Curtis and the Greasers navigating a world that rejects them.

title: The Great Gatsby
description: The roaring twenties take the stage in this musical adaptation of F. Scott Fitzgerald's timeless novel, a great big Broadway extravaganza that explodes with life and energy.

title: Stranger Things: The First Shadow
description: The Olivier Award-winning prequel to the hit Netflix series arrives on Broadway. Set in Hawkins in 1959, a new student named Henry Creel arrives and discovers that a fresh start is not so easy.

title: Chess
description: The first-ever Broadway revival of the iconic musical where power and passion collide at a World Chess Championship between America and Russia, intertwining espionage and romance.

title: Death Becomes Her
description: A new musical based on the 1992 film, following two former friends whose rivalry escalates when they encounter a magical potion restoring their youth and beauty, leading to a grudge to last eternity.

title: Buena Vista Social Club
description: The Grammy Award-winning album comes to life on stage, telling the story of legendary Cuban singer Omara Portuondo's return to the recording studio in a journey through music and memory into the heart of Havana.

title: Maybe Happy Ending
description: A Tony Award-winning romantic musical comedy about a chance encounter that sparks connection, adventure, and maybe even love, set in Seoul with a retired helper-bot as protagonist.

title: Operation Mincemeat: A New Musical
description: The Olivier and Tony Award-winning comedy musical about the wildly improbable true story behind the most unlikely secret mission of World War II.

title: Just In Time
description: An immersive Broadway musical about the journey of legendary singer Bobby Darin from teen idol to global sensation, featuring his iconic hits performed in an intimate nightclub setting.

title: Every Brilliant Thing
description: Daniel Radcliffe stars in the Broadway premiere of this acclaimed solo play about a man who looks back at his life and the glimmers of hope that carried him through, cataloging every wonderful, beautiful, and delightful thing.

title: Giant
description: John Lithgow stars as Roald Dahl in this Olivier Award-winning play about a world-famous children's author under threat, exploring a battle of wills in the wake of the true scandal that shook his legacy.

title: Two Strangers (Carry a Cake Across New York)
description: An original new musical comedy about timing, connections, and unexpected detours, following a British visitor and a no-nonsense New Yorker navigating the city together.

title: Ragtime
description: A sweeping musical adaptation of E.L. Doctorow's novel following three fictional families in pursuit of the American Dream at the dawn of the twentieth century.

title: Dog Day Afternoon
description: Jon Bernthal and Ebon Moss-Bachrach star in this new play set in summer 1972 New York City, following a Brooklyn bank holdup that escalates into chaos during the Vietnam War and Watergate era.

title: Death of a Salesman
description: Nathan Lane and Laurie Metcalf star in the Broadway revival of Arthur Miller's classic American drama about a family grappling with unfulfilled dreams and internal conflict.

title: The Fear of 13
description: Adrien Brody and Tessa Thompson star in this visceral drama based on the documentary of the same name, telling the true story of Nick Yarris who spends over two decades on death row for a murder he claims he did not commit.

title: Proof
description: Ayo Edebiri and Don Cheadle star in the Broadway revival of David Auburn's Pulitzer and Tony Award-winning play about a brilliant daughter of a renowned mathematics professor thrust into turmoil when a revelatory proof is discovered.

title: The Lost Boys, A New Musical
description: A new musical based on the cult classic 1987 Warner Bros. film, following a family who moves to Santa Carla seeking a fresh start, only to discover the town harbors a dark supernatural secret.
choreographer: Lauren Yalango-Grant and Christopher Cree Grant

title: Titanique
description: The music of Celine Dion combines with the Oscar-winning Titanic for a hysterical and joyful slay-fest, reimagining the Titanic story as Celine Dion hijacks a museum tour.
book_writer: Marla Mindelle, Constantine Rousouli, and Tye Blue

title: Beaches
description: A new musical based on the best-selling novel that inspired the blockbuster film, following two iconic characters whose oil-and-water friendship perseveres through the most tragic trials.
book_writer: Iris Rainer Dart and Thom Thomas

title: Schmigadoon!
description: A brand-new comedy trapped inside a big Broadway musical, based on the Apple TV+ series. A couple accidentally wanders into a magical town where musical numbers accompany daily life.

title: The Rocky Horror Show
description: The legendary rock musical returns to Broadway at the iconic Studio 54, featuring a stage full of strangely irresistible characters that have captivated global audiences for over fifty years.

title: Cats: The Jellicle Ball
description: A drag and ball culture-inspired reimagining of Andrew Lloyd Webber's classic musical, blending Broadway with runway aesthetics in a glittering spectacle of iconic music and electrifying ballroom choreography.

title: Joe Turner's Come and Gone
description: Taraji P. Henson and Cedric the Entertainer star in the Broadway revival of August Wilson's classic, set in a 1911 Pittsburgh boarding house following a man seeking to reunite with his lost wife after seven years of forced labor.

title: Fallen Angels
description: Kelli O'Hara and Rose Byrne star in the Broadway revival of Noel Coward's comedy of bad manners, in which two upper-class wives celebrate their romantic past with a shared suitor who may be arriving from France.

title: Becky Shaw
description: A blind date spirals spectacularly off the rails in this razor-sharp dark comedy from two-time Pulitzer Prize finalist Gina Gionfriddo.

title: The Balusters
description: A raucous new comedy about the Vernon Point Neighborhood Association, which becomes engulfed in conflict when a newcomer suggests installing a stop sign on the corner of the enclave's prettiest block.
